title: Calendar schedule PDF export - set to week, day or month

posts.author: Robert87 (Robert Sykes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I have a calendar showing multiple items per day. I need to schedule a PDF export of the calendar to subscribers showing the items, but as multiple items exist, the month view cuts off some of the items on the PDF.

A workaround is to set the calendar to week, then manually export the PDF (rather than scheduled). The PDF shows the week with more items visible, rather than the month, where less items are visible.

It would be beneficial to have the option to schedule a PDF export of a calendar and set it to week or day, rather than defaulting to month.

Alternatively, the ability to reduce the physical size of the items or allow more items to display on the month view, would also be useful.

What are you trying to achieve

Scheduled PDF export showing calendar week or day, rather than month.
